name: pre-commit-style-check
description: Deterministic pre-commit validation: format check, build verification, and optional tests.

commands.name: format-check
commands.description: Verify code formatting matches project style without applying changes.
commands.message: Code formatting violations detected. Run 'dotnet format src/' to fix, then re-stage and commit.

commands.name: build-check
commands.description: Verify all C# code compiles cleanly.
commands.message: Build failed. Fix compilation errors and re-commit.

commands.name: test-check
commands.description: Run unit tests to ensure no regressions.
commands.message: Tests failed or did not run. Review test output above.

notes: These checks run deterministically and do not depend on model behavior.
Format check blocks commit if violations are found.
Build check blocks commit if compilation fails.
Test check warns but does not block (optional for learning project).
All paths are relative to workspace root.
